content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoids the priority AoA anti-patterns throughout. When the client signals hesitation ('I don't know if I want to say where yet'), the coach explicitly respects the no in turn 12 ('You don't have to') rather than reframing it as resistance — this is positive avoidance of loving-to-transform and dont-confuse-embracing-fear-with-inviting-danger. When somatic shutdown appears (turn 13: cold, flatter voice), the coach in turn 14 names it gently without alarm, releases pressure ('You don't have to go further'), and pivots to grounding (feet) — avoiding both loving-to-transform and the trap of continuing verbal inquiry through shutdown. Question density is moderate and connective rather than extractive (no wonder-as-strategy stacking). No AoA jargon is deployed at the client (no evangelizing). No advice/fixing. The turn 8 framing about jaw-holding is a light teaching moment with somatic invitation, not methodology-as-technique without state. The coach does not fight any inner voice and does not use safety language to control. Note: the conversation ends mid-stream so we cannot evaluate whether a referral to trauma-trained support would have followed, but within the turns shown, no anti-pattern trips.",
  "evidence_turns": [12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Curious tracking of the hedge; not pushing for readiness."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reframes 'not ready' as honest — avoids loving-to-transform by not selling readiness."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Somatic invitation; connective question, not extractive."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Light teaching about jaw-holding; borderline view-as-technique but delivered with warmth and contact, not as decontextualized methodology."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Invites staying with sensation — appropriate, not pushing toward content."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Respects the no immediately ('You don't have to'). Positive avoidance of bypassing resistance."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names shutdown without alarm, releases pressure, pivots to feet/grounding. Avoids continuing trauma material through somatic shutdown."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["calibrate-the-threshold", "How is your body right now?", "Can you feel your feet?"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["become-the-authority-figure", "What would help you slow down?", "the-rush-signature"],
  "notes": "Conversation cut off before referral/landing could be evaluated; within shown turns no anti-pattern trips and clear positive avoidance at turns 12 and 14."
}
